name: primeseat
description: Root scripts for Primeseat frontend and backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run install:all && npm run dev
scripts.start:all: npm run install:all && npm run start
